title: Fun 5km wine meander in aid of Odin
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Cornerstone Lifestyle Centre is hosting a 5km fun walk in aid of Odin on Saturday 24 August.


> The Charity Wine Meander starts at 11:00, and the entrance fee is R30.


The 5km route begins at Cornerstone Lifestyle Centre, where participants can sample the delicious Boschendal MCC. From there, they will meander along the farm road to Boplaas at Redberry Farm, where they will receive their second wine sample.

On the way back to Odin, participants can enjoy a sample of Riebeek Cellars wine.

Participants are encouraged to spend time with the Odin animals and take part in the fun photo competition.

The walk concludes back at Cornerstone, where boerewors rolls will be available, and Rhino and the Rasta will perform live from 14:00.

Any additional donations for Odin can be brought to the venue.

Water and juice will be available along the way, and children are welcome to join in the fun.


> Registration starts at 09:30.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
